title: 2025819Db 5Cnlk458
summary:
Main
• August Blues Depress Volatility but Rates Hold Strong - An uneventful fortnight in terms of cargo flow has reduced near-term activity, contributing to a decline in spot rate volatility . Nevertheless, spot freight rates for Capesizes remain at historically high levels for this time of year, a notable achievement given the current economic headwinds facing the dry bulk market. Contributing to the current strength are seasonal rains in West Africa that have been weaker than in prior years, while iron ore exports from Brazil have been stronger than historical norms.
